data.content: Shipment done: overview header fix is on origin/main and included in patch release v0.14.9 at release commit 400b6f19. Release script passed lint, typecheck, unit tests, build, pushed main/tag, created https://github.com/acartine/foolery/releases/tag/v0.14.9, and verified three runtime tarballs plus sha256 assets. Remote CI and Coverage Badge runs for release commit 400b6f19 completed successfully.
